## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📊 New metric (added to MetricRegistry)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧪 Test improvement
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] 🏗️ CI/CD / Infrastructure

## Component(s) Affected

- [ ] C# API (`PrintsController.cs`, `Print.cs`)
- [ ] JavaScript frontend (`runMethod.js`, `index.html`)
- [ ] Data file (`bioprint-data.json`)
- [ ] Tests (`__tests__/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)
- [ ] CI/CD (`.github/workflows/`)
- [ ] Docker (`Dockerfile`)

## Testing

<!-- How did you test this? What tests were added or modified? -->

- [ ] Existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] New tests added for the change
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] N/A (documentation / config only)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's style and conventions
- [ ] New metrics added via MetricRegistry (not separate endpoint methods)
- [ ] Pre-computed stats updated if adding/removing metrics
- [ ] Self-review of the diff completed
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed (README, docs site, copilot-instructions.md)
